# .github

## Purpose

GitHub configuration files, including CI/CD workflow definitions for automated testing and deployment.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions workflow definitions (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`) |

## For AI Agents

- Workflows trigger on push to `main` and on pull requests
- See `workflows/AGENTS.md` for detailed workflow descriptions
